scripts.lhci: node -e "if(process.env.VERCEL){console.log('Skipping LHCI on Vercel');} else {process.exit(1)}" || lhci autorun
scripts.verify: npm run data:validate && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run canonical:check && npm run smoke && npm run integrity && npm run api:contract && npm run indexing:check && npm run readiness:audit && npm run seo:check && npm run lhci
scripts.verify:vercel: npm run data:validate && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run canonical:check && npm run smoke && npm run integrity && npm run api:contract && npm run indexing:check && npm run readiness:audit && npm run seo:check
